changes: v11.26: Nutrition & Pacing Protocol — Route & Terrain expanded with carbs/h guidance, glycogen budget logic, hydration timing, glycogen-linked W′ penalties, and stronger pacing rules.
v11.27 / v3.97: Readiness Signal Hygiene — low-side ACWR removed from readiness ambers, RI amber now requires 2-day persistence, and ACWR high-side thresholds unified.
v11.28 / v3.98: Schema Hygiene — renamed derived_metrics.polarisation_index to easy_time_ratio. Rename only, no formula change.
v11.29: Post-Workout Report Completeness Rules — never omit completed activities, never merge activity IDs, never invent explanations for anomalous sessions.
v11.30 / v3.99: DFA a1 Protocol — added per-session DFA blocks, quality gating, drift interpretation, LT1/LT2 crossing estimates, dfa_a1_profile, and report/template support.
Activity name anonymization removed — route/terrain context preserved, athlete_id redaction remains.
v11.31 / v4.00: DFA Power Calibration Indoor/Outdoor Split — cycling watts now split into indoor and outdoor estimates, HR remains pooled.
Claude Google Drive connector now reads .json files.
Upgrade: replace sync.py + pull fresh docs/templates.
